rows.action: Set the platform profile link, then verify the structured proof text before writeback.
rows.success_signal: profile proof import validates and platform tracker row can be set/live with real proof.
rows.stop_condition: A real platform screenshot/click proof must exist before running the write command.

rows.action: Refresh profile completion, launch readiness and dashboard before publishing.
rows.stop_condition: Stop before publishing while profile_configured is less than 3.

rows.action: Publish the first Iris post only after profile gate is ready; keep quiz CTA unchanged.
rows.success_signal: A real public post URL exists and replaces the placeholder in the post proof file.
rows.stop_condition: Stop if profile gate is not ready, post URL is still placeholder, caption changes CTA, or platform preview adds commercial claims.

rows.action: Attach checked-source proof for site_clicks, quiz_starts and quiz_completions.
rows.write_command: python3 tools/promotion_post_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --task-id publish-lt-s01-iris-silence --status published --published-date 2026-07-07 --post-url https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uj9ZwYIKDrE --site-clicks 0 --quiz-starts 0 --quiz-completions 0 --proof-note "<REAL_ANALYTICS_SOURCE_PROOF_NOTE> verified"
rows.success_signal: post URL, site_clicks, quiz_starts and quiz_completions are backed by checked evidence.
rows.stop_condition: Do not run writeback with placeholder URLs or guessed KPI values.

rows.action: Run weekly review only after all first-batch post URL and KPI evidence passes.
rows.success_signal: weekly_review_ready=1 and empty_data=0 before changing content or commerce paths.
rows.stop_condition: Stop all offer/Luna/affiliate prioritization while empty_data=1.

rules: Execute rows in order; later rows do not override earlier blocked gates.
Check commands are safe to run; write commands require real external proof.
Profile setup must complete for all active platforms before first-batch publishing.
Post URL and KPI evidence must complete before weekly review or commerce decisions.
